title: Add ALT-F4-LLC/notion.nvim plugin
description: Integrate notion.nvim (Notion pages in Neovim). Not in nixpkgs, so add as a flake source input and build with buildVimPlugin (agentic-nvim pattern). Wire lua/config/notion.lua + init.lua, add docs/plugins/notion.md and index it. Depends on plenary+telescope (already present). Token/DB via NOTION_TOKEN / NOTION_DATABASE_ID env vars — no secrets committed.
close_reason: Added notion.nvim via flake source input + buildVimPlugin; wired lua/config/notion.lua, which-key group, docs. Build + headless load verified.

title: Add overseer.nvim task runner to config
description: Add the overseer.nvim plugin for running and managing tasks/jobs inside Neovim. Requires: add to modules/plugins.nix (nixpkgs vimPlugins.overseer-nvim), create lua/config/overseer.lua with setup + keymaps, require it in lua/init.lua, add docs/plugins/overseer.md and index in docs/README.md, register which-key group.
close_reason: Added overseer.nvim: plugin pack entry, config module with <leader>o keymaps, which-key group, init require, and docs

title: Match Neovim colorscheme to Ghostty Cyberpunk theme
description: Override cyberdream background to purple (#332a57) to match Ghostty Cyberpunk palette, and set cyberdream as the default colorscheme.
close_reason: cyberdream palette overridden to match Ghostty Cyberpunk; verified Normal bg=#332a57, accents=#00fbac

title: Refresh usage docs and compress local Claude settings
description: Recent commits (telescope keymaps, bottom terminal overlay, oil open-in-main) left several docs stale: telescope.md claims no keymaps, which-key.md missing a/m/v groups, oil.md missing <leader>e + open-in-main, conform.md missing <leader>cf. Core editor keymaps (window nav, terminal toggle) are undocumented. Also compress .claude/settings.local.json allow-list (~60 ad-hoc entries) into broad patterns; Read() entries are redundant vs settings.json Read(**).
close_reason: Refreshed telescope/conform/oil/which-key docs, added docs/editor.md for core keymaps, compressed settings.local.json 63→18 entries, and documented both practices in CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md

title: Add Telescope find keymaps under <leader>f
description: The <leader>f 'Find' which-key group is a placeholder with no mappings. Wire up telescope.builtin find_files/live_grep/buffers/help_tags to <leader>ff/fg/fb/fh and add which-key descriptions.

title: agentic.nvim: install, smoke test, docs
description: task install; headless load smoke test (nvim --headless +lua require('agentic') +qa); interactive toggle; regression check existing plugins. Add docs/plugins/agentic.md (Purpose/Keybindings/Config Notes) documenting the @agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp prerequisite.
close_reason: task install done; headless smoke test passes (require('agentic') loads, full init.lua clean, <C-\> map SET, toggle is function); docs/plugins/agentic.md + docs/README.md AI/Agent section added; lint+luacheck clean

title: agentic.nvim: lua config + init/which-key wiring
description: Create lua/config/agentic.lua (setup provider=claude-agent-acp + keymaps: <C-\> toggle, <leader>a group). Add require('config.agentic') to lua/init.lua. Add <leader>a = 'AI/Agent' group to lua/config/which-key.lua. Verify luacheck clean.
close_reason: lua/config/agentic.lua created (provider claude-agent-acp + <C-\> toggle + <leader>a maps); wired into init.lua; <leader>a AI/Agent group added to which-key; luacheck 0/0

title: agentic.nvim: add flake input + pack entry
description: Add agentic-nvim-src (github:carlos-algms/agentic.nvim, flake=false) to flake.nix inputs and outputs arg list; thread into both import ./modules/plugins.nix calls. Add agentic-nvim entry to modules/plugins.nix. Update flake.lock. Verify task build produces result/pack/nix/start/agentic-nvim/.
close_reason: flake input agentic-nvim-src added + locked; pack entry builds via buildVimPlugin (doCheck=false); result/pack/nix/start/agentic-nvim present

title: Add agentic.nvim (carlos-algms) to the Nix plugin pack
description: Add carlos-algms/agentic.nvim ACP chat client to the reproducible Nix-built plugin pack, defaulting to the claude-agent-acp provider. Not in nixpkgs, so add as a flake=false input like octo-nvim-src. See docs/specs/agentic-dev-tools.md.
acceptance_criteria: task build/rebuild succeed; nvim --headless +lua require('agentic') +qa exits 0; <C-\> opens chat; task lint+test pass; docs/plugins/agentic.md exists; no plugin regressions.
close_reason: agentic.nvim added to Nix pack end-to-end; all acceptance criteria met
